case_title: OEI, JOHN I. et al vs. THOMAS, RONALD

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OEI, JOHN I. OEI, INDRIATI AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, RONALD SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-04-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-05-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-17-1993

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
